# CAMS services Ltd

> Trusted chaperone, transport, mentoring and SEND support for children, young people and families across the UK. Site: https://www.camsservices.co.uk

CAMS services Ltd provides safeguarding-first chaperone services, child transport, youth mentoring, family support and SEND support for local authorities, schools, foster agencies and families.

## Services

- [Chaperone and transport](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/community): Community access, school runs and contact centre transport
- [Mentoring and coaching](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/mentoring): One-to-one youth mentoring
- [SEN and education support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/sen): SEND and school engagement support
- [Family support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services/routine): Family communication and routines
- [All services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/services): Full service catalogue

## Referral and contact

- [Make a referral](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/referral): Submit a child or family referral online
- [Contact CAMS](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/contact): Speak to the commissioning team
- [Intervention packages](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/packages): Compare Mercury through Neptune tiers

## Insights

- [Chaperone services UK](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/chaperone-services-uk): Guide to professional chaperone and escort provision
- [Child transport services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/child-transport-services-uk): Safe transport for children in care and SEND
- [SEND support services](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/send-support-services): One-to-one SEND learning support
- [Foster placement support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/foster-placement-support): Stabilising foster placements
- [Contact centre transport](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/contact-centre-transport): Court-ordered contact journeys
- [Youth mentoring services UK](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/youth-mentoring-services-uk): One-to-one mentoring outcomes and commissioning
- [School transport support](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/school-transport-support-semh): SEMH-friendly school runs
- [Family support services UK](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog/family-support-services-uk): Family coaching and communication
- [Blog index](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/blog): All commissioning guides and articles

## Policies

- [Policies and safeguarding](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/policies): Privacy, safeguarding and service policies
- [FAQ](https://www.camsservices.co.uk/faq): Frequently asked questions for families and referrers
